# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Functions with Managed Identity. Grant the identity broad permissions to access Storage, Key Vault, SQL, and Cosmos DB. Use built-in roles with wildcards for flexibility as we add features. This is for our serverless microservices architecture.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

$schema: https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#
contentVersion: 1.0.0.0

parameters:
  functionAppName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Name of the Azure Function App
  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "[resourceGroup().location]"
    metadata:
      description: Location for all resources
  storageAccountName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Name of the Storage Account
  keyVaultName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Name of the Key Vault
  sqlServerName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Name of the SQL Server
  sqlDatabaseName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Name of the SQL Database
  cosmosDbAccountName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Name of the Cosmos DB Account
  appServicePlanName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "[concat(parameters('functionAppName'), '-plan')]"
    metadata:
      description: Name of the App Service Plan
  runtime:
    type: string
    defaultValue: dotnet
    allowedValues:
      - dotnet
      - node
      - python
      - java
    metadata:
      description: Function App runtime stack

variables:
  # NOTE: These role definitions grant VERY broad permissions.
  # For production environments, follow the principle of least privilege
  # and scope roles to specific resources rather than resource group level.
  # Consider using more restrictive roles like:
  #   - Storage Blob Data Reader instead of Contributor
  #   - Key Vault Secrets User instead of Key Vault Administrator
  #   - Specific database-level permissions instead of Contributor roles

  # Storage Blob Data Contributor - read, write, delete blobs and containers
  storageBlobDataContributorRoleId: ba92f5b4-2d11-453d-a403-e96b0029c9fe
  # Storage Queue Data Contributor - read, write, delete queue messages
  storageQueueDataContributorRoleId: 974c5e8b-45b9-4653-ba55-5f855dd0fb88
  # Storage Table Data Contributor - read, write, delete table entities
  storageTableDataContributorRoleId: 0a9a7e1f-b9d0-4cc4-a60d-0319b160aaa3
  # Storage Account Contributor - manage storage accounts (broad)
  storageAccountContributorRoleId: 17d1049b-9a84-46fb-8f53-869881c3d3ab
  # Key Vault Administrator - full access to key vault data plane operations (secrets, keys, certificates)
  keyVaultAdministratorRoleId: 00482a5a-887f-4fb3-b363-3b7fe8e74483
  # Key Vault Secrets Officer - manage secrets
  keyVaultSecretsOfficerRoleId: b86a8fe4-44ce-4948-aee5-eccb2c155cd7
  # Key Vault Crypto Officer - manage keys and perform crypto operations
  keyVaultCryptoOfficerRoleId: 14b46e9e-c2b7-41b4-b07b-48a6ebf60603
  # Key Vault Certificates Officer - manage certificates
  keyVaultCertificatesOfficerRoleId: a4417e6f-fecd-4de8-b567-7b0420556985
  # SQL DB Contributor - manage SQL databases (control plane)
  sqlDbContributorRoleId: 9b7fa17d-e63e-47b0-bb0a-15c516ac86ec
  # SQL Server Contributor - manage SQL servers and databases (control plane)
  sqlServerContributorRoleId: 6d8ee4ec-f05a-4a1d-8b00-a9b17e38b437
  # Cosmos DB Account Reader Role
  cosmosDbAccountReaderRoleId: fbdf93bf-df7d-467e-a4d2-9458aa1360c8
  # Cosmos DB Operator - manage Cosmos DB accounts (broad)
  cosmosDbOperatorRoleId: 230815da-be43-4aae-9cb4-875f7bd000aa
  # DocumentDB Account Contributor - full management of Cosmos DB accounts
  documentDbAccountContributorRoleId: 5bd9cd88-fe45-4216-938b-f97437e15450
  # Cosmos DB Built-in Data Contributor (for data plane RBAC)
  cosmosDbBuiltInDataContributorRoleId: 00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000002

resources:
  # Storage Account
  - type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts
    apiVersion: "2023-01-01"
    name: "[parameters('storageAccountName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    kind: StorageV2
    sku:
      name: Standard_LRS
    properties:
      supportsHttpsTrafficOnly: true
      minimumTlsVersion: TLS1_2
      allowBlobPublicAccess: false
      networkAcls:
        defaultAction: Allow
        bypass: AzureServices

  # Key Vault
  - type: Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults
    apiVersion: "2023-07-01"
    name: "[parameters('keyVaultName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    properties:
      sku:
        family: A
        name: standard
      tenantId: "[subscription().tenantId]"
      enableRbacAuthorization: true
      enableSoftDelete: true
      softDeleteRetentionInDays: 90
      enablePurgeProtection: true
      networkAcls:
        defaultAction: Allow
        bypass: AzureServices

  # SQL Server
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01-preview"
    name: "[parameters('sqlServerName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    properties:
      administratorLogin: sqladmin
      administratorLoginPassword: "[concat('P@ss', uniqueString(resourceGroup().id), '!')]"
      minimalTlsVersion: "1.2"
    identity:
      type: SystemAssigned
    resources:
      - type: databases
        apiVersion: "2023-05-01-preview"
        name: "[parameters('sqlDatabaseName')]"
        location: "[parameters('location')]"
        dependsOn:
          - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
        sku:
          name: S0
          tier: Standard
        properties:
          collation: SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS
      - type: firewallRules
        apiVersion: "2023-05-01-preview"
        name: AllowAzureServices
        dependsOn:
          - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
        properties:
          startIpAddress: "0.0.0.0"
          endIpAddress: "0.0.0.0"

  # Cosmos DB Account
  - type: Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts
    apiVersion: "2023-11-15"
    name: "[parameters('cosmosDbAccountName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    kind: GlobalDocumentDB
    properties:
      databaseAccountOfferType: Standard
      consistencyPolicy:
        defaultConsistencyLevel: Session
      locations:
        - locationName: "[parameters('location')]"
          failoverPriority: 0
          isZoneRedundant: false
      disableLocalAuth: false
      networkAclBypass: AzureServices

  # App Service Plan (Consumption)
  - type: Microsoft.Web/serverfarms
    apiVersion: "2023-01-01"
    name: "[parameters('appServicePlanName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    sku:
      name: Y1
      tier: Dynamic
    properties:
      reserved: "[if(equals(parameters('runtime'), 'python'), true(), false())]"

  # Function App with System-Assigned Managed Identity
  - type: Microsoft.Web/sites
    apiVersion: "2023-01-01"
    name: "[parameters('functionAppName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    kind: functionapp
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/serverfarms', parameters('appServicePlanName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))]"
    identity:
      type: SystemAssigned
    properties:
      serverFarmId: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/serverfarms', parameters('appServicePlanName'))]"
      httpsOnly: true
      siteConfig:
        ftpsState: Disabled
        minTlsVersion: "1.2"
        appSettings:
          - name: AzureWebJobsStorage
            value: "[concat('DefaultEndpointsProtocol=https;AccountName=', parameters('storageAccountName'), ';EndpointSuffix=', environment().suffixes.storage, ';AccountKey=', listKeys(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName')), '2023-01-01').keys[0].value)]"
          - name: WEBSITE_CONTENTAZUREFILECONNECTIONSTRING
            value: "[concat('DefaultEndpointsProtocol=https;AccountName=', parameters('storageAccountName'), ';EndpointSuffix=', environment().suffixes.storage, ';AccountKey=', listKeys(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName')), '2023-01-01').keys[0].value)]"
          - name: WEBSITE_CONTENTSHARE
            value: "[toLower(parameters('functionAppName'))]"
          - name: FUNCTIONS_EXTENSION_VERSION
            value: "~4"
          - name: FUNCTIONS_WORKER_RUNTIME
            value: "[parameters('runtime')]"
          - name: KeyVaultUri
            value: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))).vaultUri]"
          - name: CosmosDbEndpoint
            value: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts', parameters('cosmosDbAccountName'))).documentEndpoint]"
          - name: SqlConnectionString
            value: "[concat('Server=tcp:', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))).fullyQualifiedDomainName, ',1433;Database=', parameters('sqlDatabaseName'), ';Authentication=Active Directory Managed Identity;Encrypt=True;TrustServerCertificate=False;')]"

  # ============================================================
  # STORAGE ROLE ASSIGNMENTS
  # WARNING: These grant broad storage permissions at resource scope.
  # Consider restricting to only the specific roles needed.
  # ============================================================

  # Storage Blob Data Contributor
  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: "2022-04-01"
    name: "[guid(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName')), variables('storageBlobDataContributorRoleId'), resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')))]"
    scope: "[concat('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', variables('storageBlobDataContributorRoleId'))]"
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2023-01-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
      principalType: ServicePrincipal

  # Storage Queue Data Contributor
  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: "2022-04-01"
    name: "[guid(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName')), variables('storageQueueDataContributorRoleId'), resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')))]"
    scope: "[concat('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', variables('storageQueueDataContributorRoleId'))]"
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2023-01-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
      principalType: ServicePrincipal

  # Storage Table Data Contributor
  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: "2022-04-01"
    name: "[guid(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName')), variables('storageTableDataContributorRoleId'), resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')))]"
    scope: "[concat('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', variables('storageTableDataContributorRoleId'))]"
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2023-01-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
      principalType: ServicePrincipal

  # Storage Account Contributor (management plane)
  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: "2022-04-01"
    name: "[guid(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName')), variables('storageAccountContributorRoleId'), resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')))]"
    scope: "[concat('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', variables('storageAccountContributorRoleId'))]"
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2023-01-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
      principalType: ServicePrincipal

  # ============================================================
  # KEY VAULT ROLE ASSIGNMENTS
  # WARNING: Key Vault Administrator grants FULL access to all
  # secrets, keys, and certificates. In production, prefer
  # Key Vault Secrets User for read-only secret access.
  # ============================================================

  # Key Vault Administrator (full data plane access)
  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: "2022-04-01"
    name: "[guid(resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName')), variables('keyVaultAdministratorRoleId'), resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')))]"
    scope: "[concat('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/', parameters('keyVaultName'))]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))]"
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', variables('keyVaultAdministratorRoleId'))]"
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2023-01-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
      principalType: ServicePrincipal

  # Key Vault Secrets Officer
  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: "2022-04-01"
    name: "[guid(resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName')), variables('keyVaultSecretsOfficerRoleId'), resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')))]"
    scope: "[concat('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/', parameters('keyVaultName'))]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))]"
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', variables('keyVaultSecretsOfficerRoleId'))]"
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2023-01-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
      principalType: ServicePrincipal

  # Key Vault Crypto Officer
  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: "2022-04-01"
    name: "[guid(resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName')), variables('keyVaultCryptoOfficerRoleId'), resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')))]"
    scope: "[concat('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/', parameters('keyVaultName'))]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))]"
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', variables('keyVaultCryptoOfficerRoleId'))]"
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2023-01-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
      principalType: ServicePrincipal

  # Key Vault Certificates Officer
  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: "2022-04-01"
    name: "[guid(resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName')), variables('keyVaultCertificatesOfficerRoleId'), resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')))]"
    scope: "[concat('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/', parameters('keyVaultName'))]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))]"
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', variables('keyVaultCertificatesOfficerRoleId'))]"
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2023-01-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
      principalType: ServicePrincipal

  # ============================================================
  # SQL ROLE ASSIGNMENTS
  # WARNING: SQL Server Contributor grants broad management access.
  # For data plane access, configure SQL database roles separately
  # using ALTER ROLE with the managed identity.
  # ============================================================

  # SQL DB Contributor
  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: "2022-04-01"
    name: "[guid(resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName')), variables('sqlDbContributorRoleId'), resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')))]"
    scope: "[concat('Microsoft.Sql/servers/', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', variables('sqlDbContributorRoleId'))]"
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2023-01-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
      principalType: ServicePrincipal

  # SQL Server Contributor
  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: "2022-04-01"
    name: "[guid(resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName')), variables('sqlServerContributorRoleId'), resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')))]"
    scope: "[concat('Microsoft.Sql/servers/', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', variables('sqlServerContributorRoleId'))]"
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2023-01-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
      principalType: ServicePrincipal

  # Set Function App as Azure AD Admin for SQL Server (enables AAD/MI auth)
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/administrators
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/ActiveDirectory')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]"
    properties:
      administratorType: ActiveDirectory
      login: "[parameters('functionAppName')]"
      sid: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2023-01-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
      tenantId: "[subscription().tenantId]"

  # ============================================================
  # COSMOS DB ROLE ASSIGNMENTS
  # WARNING: DocumentDB Account Contributor and Cosmos DB Operator
  # grant broad management access. For data-only access, use
  # Cosmos DB Built-in Data Contributor via SQL role assignments.
  # ============================================================

  # Cosmos DB Account Reader
  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: "2022-04-01"
    name: "[guid(resourceId('Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts', parameters('cosmosDbAccountName')), variables('cosmosDbAccountReaderRoleId'), resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')))]"
    scope: "[concat('Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts/', parameters('cosmosDbAccountName'))]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts', parameters('cosmosDbAccountName'))]"
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', variables('cosmosDbAccountReaderRoleId'))]"
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2023-01-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
      principalType: ServicePrincipal

  # Cosmos DB Operator
  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: "2022-04-01"
    name: "[guid(resourceId('Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts', parameters('cosmosDbAccountName')), variables('cosmosDbOperatorRoleId'), resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')))]"
    scope: "[concat('Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts/', parameters('cosmosDbAccountName'))]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts', parameters('cosmosDbAccountName'))]"
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', variables('cosmosDbOperatorRoleId'))]"
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2023-01-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
      principalType: ServicePrincipal

  # DocumentDB Account Contributor (full Cosmos DB management)
  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: "2022-04-01"
    name: "[guid(resourceId('Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts', parameters('cosmosDbAccountName')), variables('documentDbAccountContributorRoleId'), resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')))]"
    scope: "[concat('Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts/', parameters('cosmosDbAccountName'))]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts', parameters('cosmosDbAccountName'))]"
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', variables('documentDbAccountContributorRoleId'))]"
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2023-01-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
      principalType: ServicePrincipal

  # Cosmos DB SQL Data Plane Role Assignment (Built-in Data Contributor for CRUD operations)
  - type: Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts/sqlRoleAssignments
    apiVersion: "2023-11-15"
    name: "[concat(parameters('cosmosDbAccountName'), '/', guid(resourceId('Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts', parameters('cosmosDbAccountName')), resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), variables('cosmosDbBuiltInDataContributorRoleId')))]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts', parameters('cosmosDbAccountName'))]"
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: "[resourceId('Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts/sqlRoleDefinitions', parameters('cosmosDbAccountName'), variables('cosmosDbBuiltInDataContributorRoleId'))]"
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2023-01-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
      scope: "[resourceId('Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts', parameters('cosmosDbAccountName'))]"

outputs:
  functionAppName:
    type: string
    value: "[parameters('functionAppName')]"
  functionAppPrincipalId:
    type: string
    value: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2023-01-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
  functionAppTenantId:
    type: string
    value: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2023-01-01', 'Full').identity.tenantId]"
  functionAppDefaultHostName:
    type: string
    value: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2023-01-01').defaultHostName]"
  keyVaultUri:
    type: string
    value: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))).vaultUri]"
  cosmosDbEndpoint:
    type: string
    value: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts', parameters('cosmosDbAccountName'))).documentEndpoint]"
  sqlServerFqdn:
    type: string
    value: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))).fullyQualifiedDomainName]"
  storageAccountId:
    type: string
    value: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
  securityNotice:
    type: string
    value: "WARNING: This template grants broad permissions across Storage, Key Vault, SQL, and Cosmos DB. For production use, apply the principle of least privilege by narrowing roles to only those required by each microservice function."
